evaluation.overall_comment:
This translation contains critical structural defects that render it unusable in its current state. The document suffers from multiple untranslated placeholders, direct copy-paste errors from the French original, and an accidental English paragraph. While the portions that were successfully translated demonstrate accurate technical terminology and appropriate cultural analogies, the severe lack of quality control and language consistency fundamentally breaks the document. A complete revision and rigorous post-editing are strictly required before this text can be considered functional or professional.
